_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: UK Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: UK Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: 30 calendar days before publication of interim or year‑end reports
special category data is limited to health/sickness notes

Issuer‑relative materiality: operational or strategic items reasonably expected to move Ravensmere Capital plc’s price (e.g., ≥1% revenue impact, changes to dividend policy, or a credible offer for Norwood Analytics Ltd under Project Latchkey) are treated as inside information until RNS publication.

uncertain.reason: May function as a unique internal record ID that can be linked to individuals, but not clearly covered by a specific PII type beyond internal_session_id.
Audit log reference could indirectly identify a user/session; classification as internal_session_id is debatable.
Reference code for identity verification may be a case/ticket ID rather than a session ID; mapping to internal_session_id is uncertain.
